mapper.select: SELECT b.building_id AS id, b.name AS name, b.type AS facility_type, n.y AS latitude, n.x AS longitude, NULL AS destination_id, NULL AS destination_ref_id, b.spot_name AS destination_name, 'building' AS destination_scene_type, b.type AS destination_category, NULL AS destination_rating, NULL AS destination_description, n.y AS destination_latitude, n.x AS destination_longitude FROM buildings b LEFT JOIN nodes n ON n.osmid = b.nearest_node_id UNION ALL SELECT (p.poi_id + 1000000000) AS id, p.name AS name, p.type AS facility_type, n.y AS latitude, n.x AS longitude, NULL AS destination_id, NULL AS destination_ref_id, p.spot_name AS destination_name, 'poi' AS destination_scene_type, p.type AS destination_category, NULL AS destination_rating, NULL AS destination_description, n.y AS destination_latitude, n.x AS destination_longitude FROM pois p LEFT JOIN nodes n ON n.osmid = p.nearest_node_id

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT b.building_id AS id, b.name AS name, b.type AS facility_type, n.y AS latitude, n.x AS longitude, NULL AS destination_id, NULL AS destination_ref_id, b.spot_name AS destination_name, 'building' AS destination_scene_type, b.type AS destination_category, NULL AS destination_rating, NULL AS destination_description, n.y AS destination_latitude, n.x AS destination_longitude FROM buildings b LEFT JOIN nodes n ON n.osmid = b.nearest_node_id UNION ALL SELECT (p.poi_id + 1000000000) AS id, p.name AS name, p.type AS facility_type, n.y AS latitude, n.x AS longitude, NULL AS destination_id, NULL AS destination_ref_id, p.spot_name AS destination_name, 'poi' AS destination_scene_type, p.type AS destination_category, NULL AS destination_rating, NULL AS destination_description, n.y AS destination_latitude, n.x AS destination_longitude FROM pois p LEFT JOIN nodes n ON n.osmid = p.nearest_node_id ) f WHERE LOWER(f.facility_type) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{type}) || '%' OR LOWER(f.name) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{type}) || '%' OR LOWER(f.destination_name) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{type}) || '%'

SELECT f.id, f.name, f.facility_type, f.latitude, f.longitude, f.destination_id, d.id AS destination_ref_id, d.name AS destination_name, d.scene_type AS destination_scene_type, d.category AS destination_category, d.rating AS destination_rating, d.description AS destination_description, d.latitude AS destination_latitude, d.longitude AS destination_longitude FROM facility f LEFT JOIN destination d ON d.id = f.destination_id WHERE f.id IN
#{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO facility (name, facility_type, latitude, longitude, destination_id) VALUES (#{name}, #{facilityType}, #{latitude}, #{longitude}, #{destination.id})
mapper.update: UPDATE facility SET name = #{name}, facility_type = #{facilityType}, latitude = #{latitude}, longitude = #{longitude}, destination_id = #{destination.id} WHERE id = #{id}
